item.title: Amneal Pharmaceuticals, LLC: Primidone Tablets, USP, 50 mg, 100 Tablets per Bottle, Rx only, Recall
item.product: Primidone Tablets, USP, 50 mg, 100 Tablets per Bottle, Rx only,
item.summary: Cross Contamination with Other Products: due to a potential for cross-contamination with Acemetacin API due to an issue at the API manufacturer. Product details: Primidone Tablets, USP, 50 mg, 100 Tablets per Bottle, Rx only, Manufactured by: Amneal Pharmaceuticals Pvt. Ltd., Oral Solid Dosage Unit, Ahmedabad 382213, INDIA. Distributed by: Amneal Pharmaceuticals LLC, Bridgewater, NJ 08807. NDC: 53746-544-01
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
